tools_used: CourtListener MCP opinion search and retrieval
helpful: The complete petition and union opposition exposed the decisive vehicle issues.
The statpack supplied paid-petition and originating-circuit base rates.
CourtListener confirmed recent appellate treatment of the asserted conflicts.
gaps: The ranged corpus endpoint was unreachable because its host could not be resolved.
The docket listed separate federal and union opposition briefs, but only the union brief was provisioned.
notes: The failed corpus query was non-blocking; the prediction rests on the provisioned record, committed base rates, and general CourtListener research.
